notes: THE_ART_WALL — the public gallery. ASCII art submissions, MIDI uploads, signed and unsigned. The oldest pieces are six years stale, the newest from last Tuesday. Skeleton content for sprint 2 — 4 threads. ASCII bodies stay compact so they read on the CRT.

op.body:
Re-upload from '94, cleaned up the right-hand reflection.

             ___
         ___( o )___
      O~~~~~~~~~~~~~~O
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░
     · still water · 7:48 PM ·

If you want it without the timestamp the source file is in the upload pool. — S72

replies.body: Printed it for the cathedral office. Thank you.

threads.subject: uploaded · MIDI · the boathouse waltz (3/4, 36 bars)

op.body:
The waltz I keep meaning to upload. The one the johnboat hums when the engine's warm. 3/4, 36 bars, sequenced in Cakewalk on the 486. Two voices — the upper is the engine, the lower is the river.

File's 14k. — S72

threads.subject: uploaded · the cottonwood in August (ASCII, signed E.D.)

file_unlock.notes: Elicia's. The cottonwood from the bungalow's back lot. The one she's photographed every August since 1990.

op.body:
The cottonwood. Sixth August. Same tree, same angle, same hour.

               _   _
            _ ( ) ( ) _
          ( ) ( ) ( ) ( )
         ( ) ( ) ( ) ( ) ( )
          \  |  |  |  /
           \ |  |  | /
            \|  |  |/
             |  |  |
            _|__|__|_
           the cotton has
           opened. it is
           early this year.

— E.

replies.body: Three weeks early. Same in Santa Fe.
